name: silent-failure-scanner
description: Deterministic diff-time detector for swallowed errors and ghost transactions, with a global PreToolUse commit gate that hands findings to the current Codex session to review.

interface.shortDescription: Deterministic diff-time detector for swallowed errors and ghost transactions, with a global PreToolUse commit gate that hands findings to the current Codex session to review.
interface.longDescription: Deterministic diff-time detector for swallowed errors and ghost transactions, with a global PreToolUse commit gate that hands findings to the current Codex session to review.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the silent-failure-scanner plugin for this task.
